推荐场景: 咖啡桌面对话｜道歉并修复关系
60秒任务: 「修复关系」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Can we talk about what happened?（开启修复）
I don’t want this to stay between us.（表达修复意愿）
I’m sorry for my part in it.（承担责任）
I should have listened more carefully.（承认问题）
I can see how that hurt you.（理解伤害）
That wasn’t my intention.（澄清意图）
What do you need from me now?（询问需求）
I’d like to make things right.（补救）
Can we agree on a better way forward?（达成新做法）
I don’t want to repeat the same mistake.（避免重复）
I value our friendship.（强调关系）
Let’s slow down and hear each other out.（互相倾听）
I’m willing to work on that.（承诺改进）
It may take time, and that’s okay.（接受过程）
Can we start fresh?（重新开始）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: relationship, friendship, trust, apology, mistake, intention, feeling, conversation
Verbs: repair, listen, hurt, forgive, agree, repeat, value, rebuild
Adjectives / Tone: honest, careful, defensive, hurt, patient, fair, sincere
Time / Place: after the party, at the table, in private, later, face to face
Chunks: make things right, hear each other out, start fresh, my part in it, better way forward
